subsection.heading: Fiscal years 2009 through 2013 11 So in original. Heading and text do not correspond.

content.p: Of the funds of the Commodity Credit Corporation, the Secretary of Agriculture shall make available $9,750,000 for each of fiscal years 2009 through 2012 1 to carry out this subchapter.
There is authorized to be appropriated to the Secretary of Agriculture to carry out this section $12,000,000 for each of fiscal years 2014 through 2023.

In addition to funds appropriated pursuant to the authorization of appropriations in subsection (b) for a fiscal year, the Secretary may use such amount of the funds appropriated for that fiscal year to carry out the Soil Conservation and Domestic Allotment Act (16 U.S.C. 590a et seq.) as the Secretary determines necessary to cover the cost of technical assistance, management, and enforcement responsibilities for land enrolled in the healthy forests reserve program pursuant to subsections (a) and (b) of section 6574 of this title.
The funds made available under subsection (a) shall remain available until expended.

note.heading: References in Text
note.p: The Soil Conservation and Domestic Allotment Act, referred to in subsec. (c), is act Apr. 27, 1935, ch. 85, 49 Stat. 163, which is classified generally to chapter 3B (§ 590a et seq.) of this title. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see section 590q of this title and Tables.

note.heading: Codification
note.p: Pub. L. 110–234 and Pub. L. 110–246 made identical amendments to this section. The amendments by Pub. L. 110–234 were repealed by section 4(a) of Pub. L. 110–246.

note.heading: Amendments
note.p: 2018—Subsec. (b). Pub. L. 115–334 substituted “Authorization of appropriations” for “Fiscal years 2014 through 2018” in heading and “2023” for “2018” in text.
2014—Subsec. (a). Pub. L. 113–79, § 8203(b)(1), substituted “Fiscal years 2009 through 2013” for “In general” in heading.
Subsecs. (b) to (d). Pub. L. 113–79, § 8203(b)(2), (3), added subsecs. (b) and (c) and redesignated former subsec. (b) as (d).
2008—Pub. L. 110–246, § 8205(c), amended section generally. Prior to amendment, text read as follows: “There are authorized to be appropriated to carry out this subchapter—
“(2) such sums as are necessary for each of fiscal years 2005 through 2008.”

note.heading: Effective Date of 2008 Amendment
note.p: Amendment of this section and repeal of Pub. L. 110–234 by Pub. L. 110–246 effective May 22, 2008, the date of enactment of Pub. L. 110–234, see section 4 of Pub. L. 110–246, set out as an Effective Date note under section 8701 of Title 7, Agriculture.
